must_detect.matched_text:
Internal Legal Memorandum — PDPA/MNPI Considerations for SSE Mainboard–listed Tamarind Robotics Ltd. (the Company) re: proposed acquisition of Palm Circuits Pte. Ltd.
Prepared by Larkspur & Banyan LLC (Singapore counsel) for Board and HR/Capital Markets; queries to sgcompliance@tamarindrobotics.example.
MNPI: The non-public OrchidOne yield metrics and draft term sheet (S$120m equity issuance) are price-sensitive under Singapore’s SFA Part XII and the Singa Exchange Listing Rules; trading blackout applies to insiders until a cleansing announcement via SSENet.
Mr. Daven Koh (Head of Product) disclosed insulin-dependent diabetes treatment at Seabreeze Medical on 14 May 2026 and provided a thumbprint scan for the New Tiong Vale plant turnstiles; both health and biometric data require strict PDPA access controls.
Ms. Lila Ong (Senior Engineer) has stated she is Buddhist and serves as a steward of the Mech-Tech Workers Union; export of her religion or union membership to the data room needs explicit consent or redaction.
Master Rio Tan (intern, age 16) attended a safety orientation session; minor status requires guardian consent before retention of training photos.
Employment PDPA actions: replace full names with employee codes in the virtual data room, hash biometric templates, and limit access via MangroveOS-Audit; do not upload facility pass logs beyond 90 days.
Deal context: The Board is evaluating Project Hibiscus to acquire Palm Circuits Pte. Ltd.; draft synergy models and the PelicanCore warranty backlog (May–July) are confidential and not generally available.
Any external sharing of preliminary FY2026 revenue guidance for OrchidOne would be reasonably expected to materially affect value; treat as MNPI and coordinate timing with the Exchange’s regulatory team.
